reviews.comment:
Antes tenía 5 estrellas le bajé 3 x el cambio NEGATIVO de sacar los mozos que atendían, la cajera no explica las opciones, incómodo . Cliente de mas de 10 años lo perdieron ...ahí tienen el ahorro.

(Translated by Google)
It used to have 5 stars, I lowered it by 3 because of the negative change of removing the waiters who served us. The cashier doesn't explain the options, it's uncomfortable. They lost a customer of more than 10 years... there's your savings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhdllQRUZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Genio el playero. Me cuidó para que no tomara frío. Baños siempre limpios. El café, exquisito.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant was a genius. He made sure I didn't get cold. The restrooms were always clean. The coffee was delicious.
